_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of methods and procedures for sending a payload via an existing implant
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of experimental design for ML research, including ablation study design, statistical significance in ML evaluation, benchmark construction, and reproducibility standards.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-028 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-008 (AI, cosine: 0.287), DA-S-004 (DA, cosine: 0.281).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.4/10 (raw 0.240). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [existing, implant, methods, payload, procedures, sending] vs WIDAI-only terms [ablation, benchmark, construction, design, evaluation, experimental] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.889, R=0.860). P exceeds R by 0.029 — the DCWF element's 13 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of methods and procedures for sending a payload via an existing implan" and "Knowledge of experimental design for ML research, including ablation study desig" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.359 > STS 0.240 (gap +0.118). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.3%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [existing, implant, methods, payload, procedures, sending]. WIDAI-only: [ablation, benchmark, construction, design, evaluation, experimental].
